title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Varicose Veins
description: Equisetum arvense tinctures contains silica and equisetic acid, which are its main bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can help to reduce swelling and improve circulation in varicose veins. The silica in Equisetum arvense tinctures also helps to strengthen blood vessels and improve their elasticity, making them less prone to stretching and dilation.
